Admin Panel (Demo)

Simple server-rendered demo page. Uses your existing APIs: /api/admin/donors and /api/admin/programs.

No auth (demo)

Donors

Calls GET /api/admin/donors and prints JSON.

Click “Fetch donors”.

Programs

Calls GET /api/admin/programs and prints JSON.

Click “Fetch programs”.

Create program

Calls POST /api/admin/programs (JSON body).

Fill fields and click “Create”.
Tip: Demo donation page is at /api/demo. Swagger is at /api/docs.
